title: ChatSearcher
description: Add a search box in the chat screen to make players search texts easily.
body:
This mod added a search box into the Chat Screen to make players search texts easily and quickly. This mod has been open-sourced on GitHub.
After installing this Mod, you can see a search box at the lower right corner of the Chat Screen. You can enter the content you want to search for in the search box to query the specified chat information. When it cannot be found, the information in the chat box will remain the same and will not change at all.

该模组在游戏中的聊天框界面添加了一个搜索框以便于玩家更加便捷迅速寻找地需要的聊天信息，已在 GitHub 开源。
在安装该模组后，你便可以在聊天框界面的右下角看见一个搜索框，你可以在搜索框内输入你想要搜索的内容来查询指定聊天信息，当找不到时聊天框当中的信息将保持原样，不会发生任何变化。
